_comment: NPC: Sun Zhenwei (孙振威). Canon ID: N146. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Sun Zhenwei

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Your stance is unstable. If you plan to spar today, tighten your foundation before someone exploits it.
The eastern training ground is open. I'll be there this afternoon if you want to test your techniques.
Cultivation is not a race, but hesitation in battle will kill you. Find the balance between patience and resolve.
night_lines: Halt. Identify yourself. The sect perimeter is not a place for midnight strolls.
You are out past curfew. I will not ask twice — return to the disciple dormitories.
If I find you wandering near the restricted buildings again, you will answer to Elder Zhang Tian.
The night patrol reports directly to the Sect Master. Move along, disciple.

sect_tasks.description: Sun Zhenwei checks his quiver with a scowl: 'The night patrol depletes arrows faster than the armory restocks them. I need more. Bring arrows and I will compensate you with iron from the sect stores.'

Sun Zhenwei surveys the damaged training dummies: 'Sparring destroys the equipment faster than the carpenters can repair it. Bring iron and planks — I will reinforce the dummies so the next session is not cut short.'
